description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a full wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The receiver is robust and metallic, featuring a visible lever loop beneath it for cycling the action. The fore-end and buttstock are made of polished wood, providing a traditional and ergonomic grip. Along the side of the receiver, there are visible shell holders with red shotgun shells inserted, adding both functionality and visual detail. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, protecting the trigger mechanism. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage or hunting shotguns, with a blend of wood and metal components and a utilitarian yet elegant appearance.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a full wooden stock, blued steel barrel, and visible shell holders on the receiver. The design combines polished wood and metal for a classic, functional look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, lever loop, wooden stock, and shell holders with red shells.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the barrel and stock, with the lever and shell holders partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lever, trigger guard, and the shell holders with shells more prominently.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the barrel, lever, and the wooden stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and round with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
